title: In Aid of The Moving Menagerie Creature Show
summary: Four creatures from the Moving Menagerie have escaped into the city - an Owlbear rampaging through the market district, a Blue Dragon Wyrmling loose on the rooftops, and a pack of Shadow Mastiffs in the darker streets. The Menagerie departs soon.
expires: Contract lapses when the Menagerie leaves Dorel

title: In Service of His Grace Lord Tersh
summary: Lord Tersh requests discreet guild presence at his Manor Fundraiser for the Dorel Artificer Guild. The guild has been specifically asked for. Conduct and discretion are expected throughout.
reward: 15sp per member, plus Artificer Vouchers valued at 10gp each
expires: The Gala is a fixed date

title: Care of The Family Pintfoot
summary: A funeral urn belonging to the Pintfoot family has vanished from the Dorel Delivery Company. The company has since turned unresponsive. A thorough investigation report is required; physical recovery is welcomed but not required.
completion: Full investigation report submitted to Garfield Pintfoot.
reward: 5gp in gemstones, with additional payment for physical recovery

title: Care of The House Ranstok
summary: A Ranstok family heirloom was left in the vault of their recently sold manor, now occupied by the Hamilton family. The new owners claim all possessions left at handover. A discreet extraction is required. Damage to the heirloom voids the contract.
reward: 15gp if retrieved without alerting the household

title: In Aid of the Corborough Fishing Collective
summary: The village of Corborough has seen its nets come up empty for three weeks running. The fishermen report something large moving in the shallows at night - felt more than seen. Trade with Dorel is already affected. The Collective asks for the matter to be investigated and resolved before the season is lost.
completion: The threat to Corborough's fishing grounds is identified and dealt with.
reward: 40gp, plus a standing arrangement for discounted passage along the coastal route
expires: Contract lapses at the close of the fishing season

title: The Securing of the Dorel-Hamton Pass
summary: The northway road connecting Hamton to Dorel routes has been effectively closed. A company of mercenaries - origin unknown - has established a toll post at the pass. No violence has yet been reported, but no goods have moved in a fortnight. The Hamton council has petitioned the House to resolve the blockade.
completion: The pass is cleared and the road declared open by the Hamton council's representative.
reward: 65gp, split on confirmation of safe passage

title: In Furtherance of the Kasparian University Wildlife Survey
summary: A researcher based in Kasparian University requires updated survey maps of the flora and fauna immediately surrounding Dorel to the North. Previous survey teams have returned conflicting work. The assignment is to travel the area, document and sample any unusual flora, and deliver the completed charts to the researcher. The guild has charts available, see Thalassar to collect.
completion: Completed survey charts delivered to the researcher's correspondent in Dorel.
reward: 35gp on delivery, plus expenses for the road

title: In Service of the Tamea Municipal Authority
summary: A significant sum in public funds - collected for the expansion of Tamea's artificer quarter - has gone missing from the municipal vault. The Authority has ruled out external breach. The inquiry is therefore an internal one, requiring discretion above all else. A party from outside the city is considered preferable precisely because they carry no existing alliances within Tamea. Full cooperation from the Authority's senior staff has been pledged.
completion: The missing funds are accounted for and the responsible party identified to the Authority's satisfaction.
reward: 120gp, plus formal commendation from the Tamea Municipal Authority

title: Reclamation Bounty - The Bracer of Amahurzha
summary: Westward of Marriton is a cemetary, beneath a mausoleum therein is believed to be a winding crypt of the hero Amahurzha. Amahurzha is a hero from Pelorian folklore. Historians from Undervell University and the Temple of Pelor have given a shared bounty on the reclamation of his famed bracer.
contact: High Priest Highsmith, The Historical Society of Undervell

title: The Matter of the Phasing Tower
summary: A tower has been reported on the outskirts of Dorel. Repeated sitings have stated the tower appears to be roughly 8 stories tall, early Imperial architecture, and topped with a green and blue stone. The Guild would like an assessment of this tower, and any dangers it might pose.
completion: A complete account of what the tower contains is delivered to the House, along with resolution of whatever threat - if any - is present.
reward: Variable, assessed by the House on return
